content:
河上公注云：「知可止，則財利不累於身，聲色不亂於耳目，則身不危殆也。」

  **所出**：《老子河上公章句 · 立戒》 — https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/老子河上公章句/德經

sources.title: 老子河上公章句 · 立戒

summary: The article explains that “knowing when to stop” (知止) keeps one free from the entanglements of wealth and sensual pleasure, thereby avoiding danger, as taught by Laozi and commented on by Heshang Gong.
title: 知止不殆
